//: The other half of the src/cn/ typecheck. tsconfig.json covers the DEPLOYED slice with types: [] so a stray Bun/node global is a compile error; that same barrier makes `bun:test` unresolvable. Test files are never bundled into the vault, so they keep Bun's types — and get DOM, because they assert against DOM-typed signatures. Both configs run under `bun run typecheck:cn`; between them every .ts in src/cn/ is checked exactly once.
//exclude: Same inherited-exclude trap as the sibling config — root's ["src/cn/**"] would otherwise leave zero input files.
